name: icon-generator-ai
description: Generate SVG icons, search icon sets, and convert icon formats. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_icon_svg
tools.description: Generate an SVG icon by name. Supports outline style with configurable size, color, and stroke width.

tools.name: list_icon_sets
tools.description: List all available icons, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: search_icons
tools.description: Search for icons by keyword. Returns matching icon names and their categories.

tools.name: convert_format
tools.description: Convert an icon to different output formats: react (JSX), vue, css-class, data-uri, path-only.
